sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20846" key="braxu/bwlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ´-βωλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n20846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with small</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">few clods</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">β. χέρσος</foreign> a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small</tr_> spot of ground, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.238</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollonid.</author> </bibl>): <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἴκος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0124.tlg001:7:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.2</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip. Sid.).</sense> </entryFree>
